meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: The Freelancer's Path to Rapid Deployment
content.seo_description: Overcome the SaaS knowledge gap. Learn to build production-grade apps using Antigravity and Claude Code with this expert-level, actionable checklist.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you bypass the complexity of auth, billing, and database architecture. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS solutions for your clients in days, not months.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a graveyard for ambitious ideas. You have the design skills and the client demand, but the 'SaaS knowledge gap'—that invisible wall of authentication, database schema design, and subscription logic—keeps you from scaling your freelance business into a high-ticket development machine.

You don't need a computer science degree to ship; you need a force-multiplier. This guide pivots your workflow from manual labor to architectural orchestration. We are moving beyond basic tutorials into the realm of rapid, production-ready SaaS deployment.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize a modular project structure that handles common SaaS boilerplate automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern SaaS starter boilerplate with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration. Include modular folders for components, hooks, and services.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure based on Antigravity spec'.

steps.title: Configure Identity & Access
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade auth without the security headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up authentication flows including magic links and OAuth providers. Ensure RLS (Row Level Security) policies are defined for the user table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Apply Supabase Auth policies to existing user schema'.

steps.title: Integrate Billing Logic
steps.description: Connect Stripe webhooks to your database to automate subscription management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status updates with the database 'subscriptions' table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement Stripe webhook handler in API routes'.

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Rapidly populate your UI with high-conversion, pre-styled components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a pricing page and dashboard layout using Shadcn UI components optimized for mobile and desktop.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Scaffold pricing dashboard using Shadcn UI'.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Ensure your build is production-ready before the first client demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Playwright tests for the critical path: user signup, checkout, and dashboard access.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate end-to-end tests for user onboarding flow'.

pro_tips: Always define your database schema in a single source-of-truth file before scaffolding to prevent drift.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes before you even write the business logic.
Treat your starter kit as a 'living product'—update your boilerplate every time you finish a client project.
Offload all repetitive UI boilerplate to Antigravity but keep custom business logic in clean, segregated services.
Automate your environment variable management using a secrets manager early to avoid production leaks.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your workflow to identify which components can be abstracted into a private npm package to further accelerate your future builds.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance rate. Build faster, charge more, and deliver professional software that actually scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
